final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, and CLI.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration style, sketch-like organic lines, casual marker pen aesthetic, educational infographic with simple diagrams and icons
Composition: top-to-bottom flowchart layout, central node branching to related concepts, clear visual hierarchy with connecting arrows
Subject: seven key technology concepts (AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, CLI) with brief definitions and relationship arrows showing dependencies and hierarchies
Color palette: warm accent colors (orange, teal, soft yellow) on off-white paper texture background, limited palette for clarity
Materials/textures: paper grain texture, hand-drawn line weight variation, subtle pencil shading, marker stroke imperfections
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be readable at web size; icons must be simple and intuitive; relationship arrows must clearly indicate direction and type of connection
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; 3D effects; complex gradients; cluttered layout; tiny unreadable text; stock illustration generic style
